hero.name: Carlos Augusto Prado
hero.description: I turn ambitious designs into code with pixel-perfect precision. Specialist in immersive interfaces and high-performance complex animations.

cases.title: Some of my work:
cases.disclaimer: Flexible Tech Stack:* From mastery of the fundamentals (Vanilla HTML/CSS/JS) to modern high-performance architecture with React and Next.js 14+.

sobre.title: About me:
sobre.p1: I'm a Front-End developer passionate about transforming complex ideas into fluid and intuitive digital experiences. With over 4 years in web development, my work goes beyond code: I aim to create interfaces that delight and engage, using advanced animations to bring every interaction to life.
sobre.p2: I was responsible for the front-end of Compagas's website, the natural gas company serving the entire state of Paraná. I worked on the Furukawa Solutions website, a global leader in fiber optics technology. I took part in the front-end development for Nissei, one of the top 10 pharmacy chains in Brazil. I also had the pleasure of building the new NextQuimica website, a company providing nanomaterial services and a benchmark in innovative solutions.
sobre.p3: Before that, I also contributed to other major projects, such as the new Colégio Pontual website and the new Instituto da Cerveja Brasil website.

contact.title: Send me a message!
contact.subtitle: Have a question, proposal, or just want to say hi? Go ahead.

curriculo.summary: Focused on building high-performance, accessible software and scalable systems that drive real business impact.
curriculo.experience_summary: Front-end engineering with a focus on performance and micro-interactions. Over 4 years helping major brands turn ideas into high-impact digital experiences.

meta.summary: Working in the banking ecosystem, always focused on security and accessibility for the user.
points: Implemented Micro Frontends architecture using Webpack Module Federation, drastically reducing coupling between development squads.
Defined and established React and TypeScript componentization standards, successfully adopted by the entire team.
Ensured compliance with strict security and accessibility rules required by the banking ecosystem.
Stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, TailwindCSS, Styled Components, Webpack, Module Federation.

nerdweb.summary: As a Front-End Architect, I built websites for major Brazilian companies including Helyo, Nissei, Positivo, FurukawaSolutions, Byprice, NextQuimica, and many others.
points: Lead technical stack and software architecture decisions for multiple large-scale corporate client projects (FurukawaSolutions, Positivo, Compagas, NextQuimica).
Deliver with an absolute focus on Core Web Vitals and technical SEO, ensuring high organic rankings and better conversion rates.
Achieved and maintained scores above 94 on Google performance metrics (Lighthouse/Core Web Vitals) across all applications, ensuring a smooth and optimized user experience.
Perform complex system integrations using Headless WordPress and REST/GraphQL APIs.
Stack: React, Next.js, TypeScript, GSAP, TailwindCSS, HTML, SCSS, JavaScript

seven.summary: As a Jr Full-Stack Developer, I learned a lot about the PHP ecosystem, especially with Laravel, as well as CI/CD and Docker techniques.
points: Developed the new website for Colégio Pontual Alfenas and Instituto da Cerveja Brasil.
Applied automated testing and used AWS services.
Constantly used CI/CD techniques for deployment, integrating automated tests and pipelines.

freelancer.summary: Where it all began — developing my first pages for local businesses and providing services for design agencies.
points: Styled projects with advanced techniques using SASS, Styled Components, Framer Motion and Stitches.
Automated tasks with Gulp, reducing development time by up to 40%.
